title: STAR - Infosys Full-Stack Movie Platform
content:
Project: Infosys Internship Movie Database and Analytics Platform

Situation:
- Internship project required a collaborative full-stack build with user-facing features and live interaction patterns.

Task:
- Build core application capabilities and contribute value beyond baseline requirements.

Action:
- Implemented key features including authentication, browsing, ratings, and real-time updates in a team setting.
- Added analytics-oriented exploration using database aggregation to surface user behavior patterns.
- Presented findings and technical implementation clearly to mentors and reviewers.
- Incorporated code-review feedback and engineering best practices during iterative development.

Result:
- Project delivery was successfully completed in a structured internship environment.
- The analytics contribution became an early catalyst for transitioning from software engineering toward data science and ML.
